query:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.supplierPrice, p.customerPriceUSD, p.stockQuantity, p.isVisible, c.name as categoryName
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xomvQyHT3Pc2eM.33c921a427fa --database 6qKkSV9dybS3AerhXhrTfQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.supplierPrice, p.customerPriceUSD, p.stockQuantity, p.isVisible, c.name as categoryName
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
